title: Dungeon Discs
description: Allows Dungeon chests to generate all "common" Music Discs.
body:
> **Notice:** This datapack modifies the `chest/simple_dungeon` loot table, making it incompatible with other datapacks that do the same thing.

**Dungeon Discs** modifies the `chests/simple_dungeon` loot table, allowing for all “common” music discs to generate in Monster Rooms. Common music discs in this instance refer to all the discs that can drop when a skeleton kills a creeper, so “treasure” discs such as *Otherside*, *Pigstep* and *Relic* are not changed.

![Chest Loot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LN8Xe7sJ/images/8743b569f672ebf78bf560c39f2c77d32a067bd0.png)
